svg.title: Animated analytics dashboard outline
svg.desc: A dark neon analytics dashboard showing post-launch measurement after a limited November 2025 release, with metric cards, filters, animated charts and hover tooltips.

g.text: data-led iteration after limited release in Nov ’25
Usage and helpfulness improving after limited rollout.
Signals feed prompts, routing, UI fixes, and model tuning.
Plus response time, repeat sessions, and issue rates.
Hover cards and charts reveal live dashboard values.
Post-launch growth after Nov ’25 limited release
Average turns per session by cohort
Positive vs negative feedback across channels
Helpfulness trend improves after product changes.
